34683.title: How In-School Supervised Ed-Tech Support Produces Massive Learning Gains: A Khan Academy Field Experiment in India
34683.zh_title: 校内监督下的教育技术支持如何产生巨大的学习收益：印度可汗学院实地实验
34683.authors: Philip Oreopoulos, Oliver Keyes-Krysakowski, Deepak Agarwal
34683.abstract: Computer-assisted learning (CAL) platforms frequently underperform at scale not because the technology is ineffective, but because schools face substantial implementation frictions: teachers and administrators must overcome initial technical hurdles, reorganize instructional routines, manage competing scheduling pressures, and do so while uncertain about the technology’s effectiveness—conditions that often lead to low and unproductive student engagement. This study explores whether strengthening implementation structure can raise both the quantity and quality of CAL usage in 83 residential government middle schools in Uttar Pradesh, India and, in turn, learning gains. All schools had access to Khan Academy, but randomly selected treatment schools received on-the-ground lab-in-charges whose sole responsibility was to ensure high-fidelity implementation by securing reliable connectivity, simplifying student rostering, protecting weekly practice time, supervising in-class use, coordinating content with teachers, and monitoring progress. The intervention increased platform usage from 7.2 to 47.4 minutes per week. Mathematics achievement rose by almost half a standard deviation over 31 weeks, with gains broad-based across achievement levels and question difficulty. These results show that the central constraint on effective and scalable CAL is not technology or content, but the presence of organizational structures that ensure sustained, productive instructional use.
34683.zh_abstract: 计算机辅助学习平台在大规模推广时常常表现不佳，原因并非技术无效，而是学校面临巨大的实施摩擦：教师和管理人员必须克服最初的技术障碍、重组教学常规、管理相互竞争的日程压力，并且在不确定技术有效性的情况下进行这些操作——这些条件常常导致学生参与度低且效率低下。本研究探讨了加强实施结构是否能够提高印度北方邦83所公立寄宿制中学的计算机辅助学习使用数量和质量，并进而提高学习收益。所有学校都可以使用可汗学院，但随机选择的处理学校获得了现场实验室管理员，其唯一职责是通过确保可靠的网络连接、简化学生注册、保护每周练习时间、监督课堂使用、与教师协调内容以及监控进度来保证高保真度的实施。该干预措施将平台使用时间从每周7.2分钟增加到47.4分钟。在31周内，数学成绩提高了近半个标准差，且收益在不同成绩水平和问题难度上广泛存在。这些结果表明，有效且可扩展的计算机辅助学习的核心制约因素并非技术或内容，而是确保持续、高效教学使用的组织结构的存在。
34683.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS；JEL：I2, I25, I3, O2

34682.title: Re-Examining Geographic Variation in Health and Health Care
34682.zh_title: 重新审视健康与医疗保健的地理差异
34682.abstract: A large literature has documented widespread variation in health care spending per capita across areas of the United States without correspondingly better health outcomes. Recent work has used mover designs to estimate the causal impact of place on both health care spending and mortality. In this paper, we investigate whether places that increase health care spending also tend to be places that increase health. We find that they do not and discuss the implications.
34682.zh_abstract: 大量文献记录了美国各地区人均医疗保健支出的广泛差异，而这些差异并未带来相应更好的健康结果。近期研究采用迁移者设计来估计地点对医疗保健支出和死亡率的因果影响。在本文中，我们调查了那些增加医疗保健支出的地点是否也往往是促进健康的地点。我们发现并非如此，并讨论了其含义。

34681.title: Firm Emissions and Credit Allocation
34681.authors: Grace Weishi Gu, Galina Hale, Bhavyaa Sharma, Jinhong Wu
34681.abstract: Do banks help or hamper green transition? To answer this question, we analyze the dynamics of bank lending to firms in the US, EU, and separately Denmark in relation to the borrowers' emissions of CO2. We evaluate the allocation of bank loans across industries and within industries across firms, allowing for heterogeneity of firm emissions and changes in these emissions. To facilitate green transition, bank lending needs to flow to greener and greening firms, but not out of high-emission industries that need funding to transition to cleaner production methods. Using syndicated loan data, we find that for US borrowers, bank lending was likely hampering green transition, while in the EU bank lending is more likely to facilitate it. Zooming in on Denmark, for which we have data on the full universe of firms and banks, we find more significant credit reallocation to greener firms, especially within industries. However, the reallocation of funds to green firms is, to a large extent, a byproduct of green firms becoming bigger. We do not find any evidence consistent with banks active stewardship of green transition.
34681.zh_abstract: 银行是促进还是阻碍了绿色转型？为了回答这个问题，我们分析了美国、欧盟以及单独针对丹麦的银行向企业发放贷款的动态，并与借款人的二氧化碳排放量相关联。我们评估了银行贷款在行业间以及行业内企业间的配置，考虑了企业排放的异质性和这些排放的变化。为了促进绿色转型，银行贷款需要流向更绿色和正在变绿的企业，但不能从需要资金转型为更清洁生产方式的高排放行业流出。使用银团贷款数据，我们发现对于美国借款人，银行贷款可能阻碍了绿色转型，而在欧盟，银行贷款更有可能促进绿色转型。聚焦于丹麦（我们拥有所有企业和银行的完整数据），我们发现信贷更多地重新配置给了更绿色的企业，尤其是在行业内部。然而，资金向绿色企业的重新配置在很大程度上是绿色企业规模扩大的副产品。我们没有发现任何证据表明银行在积极引导绿色转型。

34680.title: Platform Work: Evidence from Drivers in India, Indonesia, and Kenya
34680.zh_title: 平台工作：来自印度、印度尼西亚和肯尼亚司机的证据
34680.authors: Achyuta Adhvaryu, Martin Atela, Valentina Brailovskaya, Priyanka Dua, Jenny Susan John, Pratibha Joshi, Rivandra Royono
34680.abstract: Using surveys and administrative data from representative samples of drivers working on three leading gig platforms in India, Indonesia, and Kenya, we document the composition, economic experiences, and labor market trajectories of platform workers. Combining platform-based earnings with operating cost data, we estimate earnings net of costs (in PPP-adjusted terms) in each context. We find that the flexible nature of platform work enables drivers to work substantially more than the full-time equivalent, generating higher monthly net earnings than low-skill or casual employment, despite comparable or lower hourly net earnings relative to these outside options. Drivers who exit platform work in India and Indonesia do so to take up better-paying full-time positions. In contrast, Kenyan drivers often exit involuntarily, returning to offline driving with adverse financial consequences. One-third of drivers across countries rely on platform work to supplement earnings during emergencies or slow work periods, suggesting that platform work may play an important role as a financial safety net.
34680.zh_abstract: 利用来自印度、印度尼西亚和肯尼亚三个主要零工平台上工作的司机代表性样本的调查和行政数据，我们记录了平台工人的构成、经济经历和劳动力市场轨迹。结合平台收入与运营成本数据，我们估算了每个情境下扣除成本后的净收入（按购买力平价调整）。我们发现，平台工作的灵活性使司机能够工作远超全职等效时间，从而产生比低技能或临时工作更高的月净收入，尽管其小时净收入相对于这些外部选择相当或更低。在印度和印度尼西亚，退出平台工作的司机是为了从事薪酬更高的全职职位。相比之下，肯尼亚司机通常是非自愿退出，回到线下驾驶工作并面临不利的财务后果。各国约有三分之一的司机依赖平台工作来补充紧急情况或工作淡季的收入，这表明平台工作可能作为财务安全网发挥重要作用。

34679.title: Transformed Intermediation: Credit Risk to NBFIs, Liquidity Risk to Banks
34679.zh_title: 转型的中介：非银行金融机构的信用风险与银行的流动性风险
34679.authors: Viral V. Acharya, Nicola Cetorelli, Bruce Tuckman
34679.abstract: We argue that the rapid asset growth of nonbank financial intermediaries (NBFIs) relative to banks is the outcome of transformations of risks between banks and NBFIs that increase the interconnectedness of the two sectors. These transformations are consistent with avoiding tighter, post-GFC bank regulation while harnessing the funding and liquidity advantages of bank deposit franchises and access to safety nets. Specifically, we show that banks fund NBFIs through senior loans and credit lines, which NBFIs use for acquiring junior credit claims, warehouse financing, and liquidity management. We empirically demonstrate that shocks experienced by NBFIs spillover to the banks that provide them with credit lines, particularly in times of stress. We then describe a number of policy approaches that are consistent with our transformation view and conclude with suggestions for future research.
34679.zh_abstract: 我们认为，非银行金融中介相对于银行的快速资产增长，是银行与非银行金融中介之间风险转型的结果，这种转型增加了两个部门的相互关联性。这些转型与规避后全球金融危机时期更严格的银行监管相一致，同时利用了银行存款特许经营权的融资和流动性优势以及获得安全网的机会。具体来说，我们表明银行通过优先贷款和信贷额度为非银行金融中介提供资金，非银行金融中介则将其用于获取次级信用债权、仓储融资和流动性管理。我们实证证明，非银行金融中介遭受的冲击会溢出到为其提供信贷额度的银行，尤其是在压力时期。然后，我们描述了一系列与我们的转型观点相一致的政策方法，并最后提出了未来研究的建议。

34678.title: Do GLP-1 Medications Pay for Themselves?
34678.zh_title: GLP-1 药物能收回成本吗？
34678.authors: Coady Wing, Sih-Ting Cai, Daniel W. Sacks, Kosali I. Simon
34678.abstract: Glucagon-like peptide-1 receptor agonists (GLP-1s) represent a major improvement in treatment of diabetes, obesity, and cardiovascular risk reduction, but they are also among the most expensive drugs in widespread use and the subject of significant policy debate. The high price of these drugs may overstate their net cost if the health improvements they produce lead to reduced downstream health care use and medical spending, that is, cost offsets. We estimate such offsets using insurance claims data, examining the effects of GLP-1 initiation on subsequent GLP-1 use and spending, and on other non-GLP-1 spending. We use a stacked difference-in-differences design, comparing patients initiating GLP-1 medication to not-yet-treated controls who initiate GLP-1s several months or years later, allowing us to control for underlying time trends and baseline characteristics. Overall, we do not find a reduction in downstream medical spending. Although GLP-1 initiation reduces spending on other diabetes medications, total non-GLP-1 spending increases, driven by higher outpatient health care use; GLP- 1 drug spending rises mechanically. For health care payers, the relevant cost of GLP-1 initiation therefore extends beyond the sticker price of the drug. We find similar results across subgroups of GLP1 initiators including those with prior cardiovascular disease and those without diabetes (consistent with obesity indication). Our main results examine spending responses over the first year after initiation. However, we also estimate longer run effects in a smaller sample and find no cost offsets even five years after GLP-1 initiation. Taken together, these results suggest that payers facing the costs of GLP-1 coverage are unlikely to see large savings from reduced spending on other care. If GLP-1 therapies ultimately yield cost savings, they are likely to occur only over longer horizons or through non-medical channels.
34678.zh_abstract: 胰高血糖素样肽-1 受体激动剂代表了治疗糖尿病、肥胖症和降低心血管风险方面的重大进步，但它们也是广泛使用中最昂贵的药物之一，并且是重大政策辩论的主题。如果这些药物带来的健康改善导致后续医疗保健使用和医疗支出减少（即成本抵消），那么它们的高价可能高估了其净成本。我们使用保险索赔数据来估计此类抵消，考察开始使用 GLP-1 对后续 GLP-1 使用和支出以及其他非 GLP-1 支出的影响。我们采用堆叠双重差分设计，将开始使用 GLP-1 药物的患者与几个月或几年后才开始使用 GLP-1 的尚未接受治疗的对照组进行比较，从而能够控制潜在的时间趋势和基线特征。总体而言，我们没有发现后续医疗支出减少。尽管开始使用 GLP-1 减少了其他糖尿病药物的支出，但非 GLP-1 总支出增加了，这是由门诊医疗使用增加所驱动的；GLP-1 药物支出则机械地增加。因此，对于医疗支付方来说，开始使用 GLP-1 的相关成本超出了药物的标价。我们在 GLP-1 开始使用者的亚组中发现了类似的结果，包括那些既往有心血管疾病的人和没有糖尿病的人（与肥胖适应症一致）。我们的主要结果考察了开始使用后第一年的支出反应。然而，我们也在一个较小的样本中估计了长期效应，发现即使在开始使用 GLP-1 五年后也没有成本抵消。综合来看，这些结果表明，面临 GLP-1 覆盖成本的支付方不太可能通过减少其他护理支出来实现大量节省。如果 GLP-1 疗法最终能带来成本节约，那很可能只会在更长的时期内或通过非医疗渠道实现。

34677.title: The Impact of Preschool Entry Age on Children’s Behavioral and Developmental Health in Medicaid
34677.zh_title: 学前入学年龄对医疗补助计划中儿童行为与发育健康的影响
34677.authors: Maya Rossin-Slater, Adrienne Sabety, Aileen Wu
34677.abstract: We find that public preschools are a gateway to health and social services. Low-income children born shortly before their state’s school-entry cutoff date are more likely to receive school-based services, speech-language pathology, occupational or physical therapy, and vision and dental services at ages three and four, compared to children born after the cutoff. They are also more likely to receive financial support through Supplemental Security Income. These findings suggest that preschool enrollment connects low-income children to the health and social service system in ways that extend beyond the classroom.
34677.zh_abstract: 我们发现公立幼儿园是获得健康和社会服务的门户。与出生在入学截止日期之后的低收入家庭儿童相比，出生在所在州入学截止日期之前不久的儿童在三岁和四岁时更有可能获得学校服务、言语语言病理学、职业或物理治疗以及视力和牙科服务。他们也更有可能通过补充保障收入获得经济支持。这些发现表明，学前入学将低收入儿童与健康和社会服务体系联系起来，其方式超出了课堂范围。

34676.title: Corporate Intent
34676.authors: Augustin Landier, Parinitha R. Sastry, David Thesmar
34676.abstract: Do investors care about why a firm behaves responsibly, over and above what the firm does and how much cash it earns? In our main experiment, participants value shares in companies that reduce pollution relative to peers, while CEOs articulate the company’s intentions: prosocial or for-profit. Investors are willing to pay more for shares in a company that takes a given prosocial action if it is motivated by social concern rather than profit maximization. This "intention premium" is distinct from the valuation effects of cash flows and environmental externalities. Respondents who are deontological, politically liberal, female, or less individualistic value the company’s intent the most. Additionally, and somewhat surprisingly, respondents view favorably firms that embrace both profit and social objectives, without ranking them. Overall, our findings temper claims that when there is no financial trade-off between doing good and doing well, shareholder value and stakeholder value maximization are equivalent.
34676.zh_abstract: 投资者是否关心企业为何采取负责任的行为，而不仅仅是企业做了什么以及赚了多少钱？在我们的主要实验中，参与者对减少污染（相对于同行）的公司的股票进行估值，同时首席执行官阐述了公司的意图：亲社会或为了盈利。如果一家公司采取给定的亲社会行为是出于社会关切而非利润最大化，那么投资者愿意为其股票支付更高的价格。这种“意图溢价”与现金流和环境外部性的估值效应不同。道义论者、政治自由派、女性或较少个人主义的受访者对公司的意图评价最高。此外，有点令人惊讶的是，受访者对同时追求利润和社会目标且不进行排序的公司持正面看法。总体而言，我们的发现缓和了这样一种说法，即当行善与做得好之间没有财务权衡时，股东价值最大化与利益相关者价值最大化是等价的。

34675.title: Experiences, Expectations, and Asset Prices
34675.abstract: In models with subjective beliefs, the dynamics of investor beliefs are central to explaining asset price movements. Allowing subjective beliefs to deviate from full-information rational expectations requires a model of how investors form beliefs. I review recent research that explores experience-based belief formation. The experience-based model closely resembles Bayesian updating but allows individuals to overweight data observed during their own lifetimes when forming beliefs about the parameters of the data-generating process. Because individuals of different age learn from different histories, the model predicts heterogeneity between age groups that evolves over time with the path of realized data individuals have experienced, closely mirroring the age-related variation observed in survey microdata. At the aggregate level, experience-based expectations formation can explain asset price dynamics. In the stock market, learning from experience about long-run cash flow growth generates valuation cycles and return predictability. Experience-based formation of long-term inflation expectations can explain secular changes of real interest rates. I conclude by outlining directions for future research.
34675.zh_abstract: 在具有主观信念的模型中，投资者信念的动态变化对于解释资产价格变动至关重要。允许主观信念偏离完全信息理性预期需要建立一个投资者如何形成信念的模型。我回顾了近期探索基于经历信念形成的研究。基于经历的模型与贝叶斯更新非常相似，但允许个体在形成关于数据生成过程参数的信念时，过度加权其一生中观察到的数据。由于不同年龄的个体从不同的历史中学习，该模型预测了年龄组之间的异质性，这种异质性随着个体所经历的实际数据路径而随时间演变，这与调查微观数据中观察到的与年龄相关的变化高度吻合。在总体层面，基于经历的预期形成可以解释资产价格动态。在股票市场中，从经历中学习长期现金流增长会产生估值周期和回报可预测性。基于经历形成的长期通胀预期可以解释实际利率的长期变化。最后，我概述了未来研究的方向。

34674.title: The Economics of Scaling Early Childhood Programs: Lessons from The Chicago School
34674.zh_title: 早期儿童项目规模化经济学：来自芝加哥学派的启示
34674.abstract: Many ideas show remarkable returns in small-scale trials but often disappoint when scaled to broader populations and contexts. Using early childhood investment as a case study, this study develops a dynamic human capital formation model that integrates complementary skill investment with “Option C thinking” on scaling challenges. The model is stylized in the Chicago tradition: micro-founded with optimizing agents, dynamic skill production, and a policymaker evaluating scaling decisions. It formalizes how naive extrapolation from pilot studies systematically overestimates policy efficacy by ignoring “voltage drops,” declining treatment effects due to unrepresentativeness at scale. The model demonstrates that optimal scaling policy requires mechanism-based design that anticipates these failures through backward induction from implementation realities. The scientific insights from a set of recent studies provide valuable perspectives on the model.
34674.zh_abstract: 许多理念在小规模试验中表现出显著的回报，但在推广到更广泛的人群和环境时却常常令人失望。本研究以早期儿童投资为案例，构建了一个动态人力资本形成模型，该模型将互补性技能投资与关于规模化挑战的“选项C思维”相结合。该模型是芝加哥传统风格的典型代表：以微观基础为起点，包含优化行为的代理人、动态技能生产以及评估规模化决策的政策制定者。它形式化了从试点研究中进行天真外推如何系统地高估政策有效性，原因在于忽略了“电压降”，即由于规模化后样本不具代表性而导致处理效应递减。该模型表明，最优规模化政策需要基于机制的设计，通过从实施现实出发进行反向归纳来预见这些失败。一系列近期研究的科学见解为该模型提供了有价值的视角。
34674.meta: Programs：LS, PE, PR；JEL：C9, C91, C93, H10, H4, H41, J24

34673.title: Legalizing Cannabis: Implications for Child Maltreatment
34673.zh_title: 大麻合法化：对儿童虐待的影响
34673.authors: Weiwei Chen, Johanna Catherine Maclean, Michael T. French
34673.abstract: Cannabis is the most used illicit drug in the United States. Though cannabis possession and consumption are prohibited federally, states are increasingly implementing laws that legalize this substance, initially for medical and, more recently, for recreational use. We study the impact of recreational cannabis laws on child maltreatment reports. To do so, we employ difference-in-differences and event-study methods to analyze administrative data on child maltreatment reports as well as child injury-related deaths 2010-2022. We find that recent efforts to legalize cannabis for recreational consumption have not led to an increase in child maltreatment reports and may reduce particularly severe maltreatment.
34673.zh_abstract: 大麻是美国使用最广泛的非法药物。尽管联邦层面禁止持有和消费大麻，但各州越来越多地实施使该物质合法化的法律，最初是用于医疗用途，最近则用于娱乐用途。我们研究了娱乐性大麻法律对儿童虐待报告的影响。为此，我们采用双重差分法和事件研究法，分析了2010年至2022年关于儿童虐待报告以及儿童伤害相关死亡的行政数据。我们发现，近期将大麻用于娱乐消费合法化的努力并未导致儿童虐待报告的增加，并且可能减少特别严重的虐待行为。

34672.title: How Globalization Unravels: A Ricardian Model of Endogenous Trade Policy
34672.zh_title: 全球化如何瓦解：一个内生贸易政策的李嘉图模型
34672.authors: Jesús Fernández-Villaverde, Tomohide Mineyama, Dongho Song
34672.abstract: We study how uneven gains from globalization can endogenously generate protectionism as a political equilibrium. Using U.S. data, we document that regions more exposed to import competition display stronger opposition to globalization, especially among households with little financial wealth, and that firms in trade-exposed sectors sharply increase lobbying expenditures. To interpret these patterns, we develop and quantify a general equilibrium Ricardian model with heterogeneous households, input-output linkages, and endogenous trade policy shaped by voting and lobbying. Distributional shocks reallocate political support among voters, while lobbying propagates through production networks, generating strategic complementarities that sustain protectionism. Calibrated to U.S.-China sectoral data from 1991--2019, the model accounts for rising inequality, declining support for globalization, and key aggregate trends in consumption and trade.
34672.zh_abstract: 我们研究了全球化的不均衡收益如何内生地产生作为政治均衡的保护主义。利用美国数据，我们记录了受进口竞争影响更大的地区表现出对全球化更强的反对，尤其是在金融财富较少的家庭中，并且贸易暴露部门的企业大幅增加了游说支出。为了解释这些模式，我们构建并量化了一个一般均衡李嘉图模型，该模型包含异质性家庭、投入产出关联以及由投票和游说塑造的内生贸易政策。分配冲击重新分配了选民之间的政治支持，而游说则通过生产网络传播，产生了维持保护主义的战略互补性。该模型根据1991年至2019年的美国-中国部门数据进行校准，解释了不平等加剧、对全球化的支持下降以及消费和贸易方面的关键总体趋势。
34672.meta: Programs：EFG, POL；JEL：D57, D58, D63, D72, F1, F2, F4, F6

34671.title: With or Without U? Binning Bias and the Causal Effects of Temperature Extremes
34671.zh_title: 有U还是无U？分箱偏差与极端温度的因果效应
34671.authors: Benjamin Jones, Jacob Moscona, Benjamin A. Olken, Cristine von Dessauer
34671.abstract: Estimates of climate impacts show that extreme temperatures have large and wide-spread effects. To estimate these effects, a common approach counts days in different temperature ranges and considers how exposure to these distinct 'bins' affects outcomes. This often produces non-linear, U-shaped results, in which high and low temperatures have the largest effects. We show that non-linear approaches like these can generate spurious findings. Specifically, global warming induces trends in extreme temperature exposure that correlate mechanically with a location's baseline temperature. Substantial bias emerges if trends in the outcome variable also correlate with baseline temperature for any reason. We demonstrate this problem theoretically, in simulations, and with real outcomes. We then develop solutions. In applications using US data, some results in the literature are unaffected by these corrections, while other results change substantially.
34671.zh_abstract: 对气候影响的估计表明，极端温度具有巨大且广泛的影响。为了估计这些效应，一种常见的方法是计算不同温度范围内的天数，并考虑暴露于这些不同“分箱”如何影响结果。这通常会产生非线性的U形结果，其中高温和低温的影响最大。我们表明，像这样的非线性方法可能会产生虚假的发现。具体来说，全球变暖会导致极端温度暴露的趋势，该趋势与某个地点的基线温度存在机械相关性。如果结果变量的趋势也因任何原因与基线温度相关，则会出现显著的偏差。我们在理论上、模拟中以及使用真实结果证明了这个问题。然后我们提出了解决方案。在使用美国数据的应用中，文献中的一些结果不受这些修正的影响，而其他结果则发生了显著变化。

34670.title: Effective Protection with Global Value Chains
34670.zh_title: 全球价值链中的有效保护
34670.authors: Emily J. Blanchard, Mitchell W. Boice, Robert C. Johnson
34670.abstract: The effective rate of protection (ERP) is a widely-used tool to evaluate the joint impact of input and output tariffs on the net protection offered to individual sectors. Nonetheless, the theoretical foundations underlying the traditional ERP are decades out of date. In this paper, we provide fresh guidance for policy analysts that seek to measure effective protection, with two core elements. First, we develop a new ERP concept, which measures how much tariffs shift the derived demand for real value added at the sector level. The ERP then has an intuitive interpretation: it is the effective subsidy to buyers of sectoral value added that replicates the impact of the tariff structure on demand. Second, we demonstrate how to compute our ERP index accounting for global value chain linkages. The result is an ERP for the GVC age, in which effective protection depends on the structure of value chains across countries and sectors, and the structure of all tariffs applied globally. We demonstrate the usefulness of our approach by analyzing how recent tariff changes have altered effective protection in the United States and the rest of the world.
34670.zh_abstract: 有效保护率（ERP）是一种广泛使用的工具，用于评估投入品关税和产出品关税对单个部门净保护的综合影响。然而，传统ERP的理论基础已经过时数十年。在本文中，我们为寻求衡量有效保护的政策分析师提供了新的指导，包含两个核心要素。首先，我们提出了一个新的ERP概念，它衡量关税在多大程度上改变了部门层面实际增加值的派生需求。那么，ERP就有了一个直观的解释：它是复制关税结构对需求影响的、对部门增加值购买者的有效补贴。其次，我们展示了如何计算考虑全球价值链联系的ERP指数。其结果是一个适用于全球价值链时代的ERP，其中有效保护取决于跨国家和跨部门的价值链结构，以及全球范围内所有关税的结构。我们通过分析近期关税变化如何改变美国和世界其他地区的有效保护，展示了我们方法的实用性。

34669.title: Price Discrimination with Costless Resale
34669.zh_title: 无成本转售下的价格歧视
34669.abstract: This paper shows that income effects create an endogenous barrier to arbitrage, allowing price discrimination to survive costless resale. A monopolist sells an indivisible good to consumers with heterogeneous incomes who can freely resell. When the good is strictly normal, a consumer's reservation price to resell increases as the purchase price decreases—lower prices leave buyers wealthier and raise their valuation of the good. The monopolist exploits this by subsidising low-income consumers to raise their reservation prices to a target that high-income consumers must also pay. The optimal schedule increases dollar-for-dollar with income in the subsidised segment, weakly dominates uniform pricing, and achieves the first-best allocation when the entire market is served. We show the mechanism extends beyond income effects: low substitutability with market alternatives generates large reservation-price responses even when income sensitivity is modest. Sustaining discrimination requires market power at the individual level—consumer-specific quantity limits—not merely aggregate output restrictions. Extensions examine multiple monopolists and endogenous privacy choices.
34669.zh_abstract: 本文表明，收入效应创造了一种内生的套利障碍，使得价格歧视能够在无成本转售的情况下存在。一个垄断者向收入异质且可以自由转售的消费者出售一种不可分割的商品。当该商品是严格正常品时，消费者转售的保留价格会随着购买价格的降低而上升——更低的价格使买家更富有，并提高了他们对商品的估值。垄断者利用这一点，通过补贴低收入消费者，将他们的保留价格提高到高收入消费者也必须支付的目标水平。最优定价方案在受补贴的细分市场中与收入呈一对一增长，弱优于统一定价，并且在服务整个市场时实现了最优配置。我们表明，该机制超越了收入效应：即使收入敏感性不高，与市场替代品的低替代性也会产生巨大的保留价格反应。维持歧视需要个体层面的市场力量——消费者特定的数量限制——而不仅仅是总产出限制。扩展部分考察了多个垄断者和内生隐私选择。

34668.title: Automation Experiments and Inequality
34668.authors: Seth Gordon Benzell, Kyle R. Myers
34668.abstract: Many experiments study the productivity effects of automation technologies such as generative algorithms. A key test in these experiments relates to inequality: does the technology increase output more for high- or low-skill workers? However, the theoretical content of this empirical test has been unclear. Here, we formalize a theory that describes the experimental effect of automation technologies on worker-level output and, therefore, inequality. Worker-level output depends on a task-level production function, and workers are heterogeneous in their task-level skills. Workers perform a task themselves or delegate it to the automation technology. The inequality effect of improved automation depends on the interaction of two factors: (i) the correlation in task-level skills across workers, and (ii) workers' skills relative to the technology's effective skill. In many cases we study, the inequality effect is non-monotonic --- as technologies improve, inequality decreases then increases. The model and descriptive statistics of skill correlations generally suggest that the diversity of automation technologies will play an important role in the evolution of inequality.
34668.zh_abstract: 许多实验研究自动化技术（如生成式算法）的生产率效应。这些实验中的一个关键检验与不平等有关：该技术是增加了高技能工人还是低技能工人的产出？然而，这一实证检验的理论内涵一直不明确。在此，我们形式化了一个理论，描述了自动化技术对工人层面产出（进而对不平等）的实验效应。工人层面的产出取决于任务层面的生产函数，而工人在任务层面的技能是异质的。工人要么自己执行任务，要么将其委托给自动化技术。自动化改进的不平等效应取决于两个因素的相互作用：（i）工人之间任务层面技能的相关性，以及（ii）工人技能相对于技术有效技能的水平。在我们研究的许多情况下，不平等效应是非单调的——随着技术的改进，不平等先下降后上升。该模型和技能相关性的描述性统计普遍表明，自动化技术的多样性将在不平等的演变中发挥重要作用。

34667.title: Weighing the Impacts of GLP-1s: Quasi-Experimental Evidence From Provider Adoption
34667.zh_title: 权衡GLP-1药物的影响：来自医疗服务提供者采用的准实验证据
34667.authors: Sam Bock, Jasmin Moshfegh, Jonathan Zhang
34667.abstract: The arrival of GLP-1 medications has been described as one of the most important health care innovations in recent years. We provide large-scale quasi-experimental evidence on their real-world impacts by exploiting variation in the eventual prescribing propensities of patients’ pre-existing primary care providers. Using a panel intent-to-treat design, we compare outcomes for 1.4 million diabetic or obese veterans based on their 2018 provider’s eventual propensity to adopt GLP-1s, leveraging comprehensive electronic health records and biomarker data from the Veterans Health Administration, a setting with minimal insurance attrition and low-cost access to these drugs. Patients whose providers become higher propensity adopters experience substantial improvements in glycemic control and clinically meaningful weight loss; our treatment-on-the-treated estimates closely match estimates from clinical trials. Despite these metabolic benefits, we find no statistically significant average effects on emergency department utilization, mental health and substance use outcomes, or non–GLP-1 medical spending through 2024. However, quantile regression results show heterogeneous effects, with spending declining at lower quantiles and rising at higher quantiles for patients of higher-propensity adopters.
34667.zh_abstract: GLP-1药物的问世被描述为近年来最重要的医疗创新之一。我们通过利用患者既往初级医疗服务提供者最终处方倾向的差异，提供了关于其现实世界影响的大规模准实验证据。采用面板意向性治疗设计，我们根据患者2018年时的医疗服务提供者最终采用GLP-1药物的倾向，比较了140万患有糖尿病或肥胖症的退伍军人的结果，利用了退伍军人健康管理局（Veterans Health Administration）的综合电子健康记录和生物标志物数据，该环境具有最低的保险流失率和获取这些药物的低成本途径。其医疗服务提供者成为更高倾向采用者的患者，在血糖控制方面经历了显著改善，并实现了具有临床意义的体重减轻；我们的处理组平均处理效应估计值与临床试验的估计值非常接近。尽管有这些代谢益处，但我们发现，截至2024年，在急诊科使用率、心理健康和物质使用结果或非GLP-1医疗支出方面，没有统计学上显著的平均效应。然而，分位数回归结果显示存在异质性效应，对于更高倾向采用者的患者，支出在较低分位数上下降，在较高分位数上上升。

34666.title: State and Time-Dependent Pricing
34666.zh_title: 状态依赖与时间依赖定价
34666.authors: Philip Bunn, Nicholas Bloom, Craig Menzies, Paul Mizen, Gregory Thwaites, Ivan Yotzov
34666.abstract: We present new evidence on how firms set prices using direct questions from a large, economy-wide survey of UK firms. Since 2023, 54% of firms report setting prices in a state-dependent manner, as opposed to changing prices at fixed intervals. In contrast, 44% of firms used state-dependent pricing in 2019. Smaller firms, those with a higher share of non-labour costs, and those reporting higher subjective uncertainty around sales and prices are more likely to be state-dependent. We then analyse the implications of price-setting behaviour for inflation dynamics. State-dependent firms experienced a sharper increase in price growth over 2022-2023, and also a faster subsequent decline. Using evidence from a randomised survey experiment, firm-level forecast errors, and local projections, we show that prices of state-dependent firms respond faster to cost shocks. The difference between state-dependent and time-dependent firms is furthermore larger for bigger shocks, consistent with theoretical predictions.
34666.zh_abstract: 我们利用对英国企业进行的大规模经济调查中的直接提问，提供了关于企业如何定价的新证据。自2023年以来，54%的企业报告以状态依赖的方式设定价格，而非在固定间隔内改变价格。相比之下，2019年有44%的企业采用状态依赖定价。规模较小的企业、非劳动力成本份额较高的企业，以及报告对销售和价格主观不确定性较高的企业，更倾向于采用状态依赖定价。然后，我们分析了定价行为对通胀动态的影响。状态依赖型企业在2022-2023年期间经历了更剧烈的价格增长，随后也出现了更快的下降。利用来自随机调查实验、企业层面预测误差和局部投影法的证据，我们表明状态依赖型企业的价格对成本冲击的反应更快。此外，对于更大的冲击，状态依赖型企业和时间依赖型企业之间的差异更大，这与理论预测一致。

34665.title: Brexit and UK Migration: Germany-Benchmarked Evidence on Structural and Reallocation Shifts
34665.zh_title: 英国脱欧与英国移民：关于结构性变化和重新配置变化的德国基准证据
34665.abstract: This paper examines how Brexit reshaped the volume and composition of UK migration flows. To address the inherent endogeneity of migration responses to political change, the study employs a Difference-in-Differences design that benchmarks the United Kingdom against Germany, a stable EU member unaffected by Brexit-related institutional shocks. Treating the 2016 referendum and the 2021 end of free movement as sequential shocks, the results show that migration volume increased after both shocks, but through different channels: the referendum reduced emigration relative to Germany, while the post-2021 points-based system triggered a reallocation of inflows away from EU free-movement migrants toward non-EU migrants from the rest of the world, with a markedly stronger skill-selective profile. The paper analyzes how Brexit reshaped migration flows into and out of the United Kingdom by exploiting the 2016 referendum and the 2021 termination of free movement as sequential institutional shocks. Using a Difference-in-Differences design with Germany as a stable EU benchmark, the results show that Brexit acted as a structural regime shock, not a border-tightening event. Net migration into the UK rose after both shocks—first due to a sharp post-referendum decline in emigration relative to Germany, and later due to a substantial expansion of non-EU immigration under the new points-based system. Immigration patterns exhibit a clear regime shift, with EU inflows contracting sharply after 2016 and globally sourced, skill-selective inflows rising after 2021. In the later period, a modest but notable increase in UK-born emigration relative to Germany also emerges, reflecting frictions in post-Brexit mobility. Overall, Brexit reoriented—rather than reduced—UK migration flows, transforming both their scale and composition.
34665.zh_abstract: 本文考察了英国脱欧如何重塑英国移民流动的规模和构成。为了解决移民对政治变化反应的内生性问题，本研究采用了双重差分设计，以德国（一个未受英国脱欧相关制度冲击影响的稳定欧盟成员国）作为英国的基准。将2016年公投和2021年人员自由流动的结束视为连续冲击，结果显示，两次冲击后移民数量均有所增加，但通过不同的渠道：公投降低了相对于德国的移民流出，而2021年后的积分制则引发了移民流入从欧盟自由流动移民向世界其他地区非欧盟移民的重新配置，且具有显著更强的技能选择性。本文通过利用2016年公投和2021年人员自由流动的终止作为连续的制度冲击，分析了英国脱欧如何重塑进出英国的移民流动。使用以德国作为稳定欧盟基准的双重差分设计，结果表明英国脱欧是一个结构性制度冲击，而非边境收紧事件。两次冲击后，英国的净移民均有所上升——首先是由于公投后相对于德国的移民流出急剧下降，随后是由于在新的积分制下非欧盟移民的大幅扩张。移民模式呈现出明显的制度转变，欧盟流入在2016年后急剧收缩，而全球来源的、具有技能选择性的流入在2021年后上升。在后期，相对于德国，英国本土出生的移民流出也出现了适度但显著的增长，反映了脱欧后流动性的摩擦。总体而言，英国脱欧重新定位了——而非减少了——英国的移民流动，改变了其规模和构成。

34664.title: Global Stratification Economics (GSE): A Primer - Definitions and Research Implications
34664.zh_title: 全球分层经济学（GSE）：入门指南——定义与研究意义
34664.authors: Alan A. Aja, Anita Alves Pena, Mary Lopez
34664.abstract: We coin the term Global Stratification Economics (GSE) to extend Stratification Economics (SE) to international contexts where mechanisms emerge that can be identified as (1) universal but matched to positioning along a country’s development path or (2) context-specific and historically dependent in ways different from the United States and other international environments. Building on SE’s core insight that groups compete over scarce resources and that dominant groups shape rules to preserve advantage, we define GSE as an approach that foregrounds historical genesis (e.g., settler colonialism, slavery, caste, extractive governance, military intervention), local institutions that structure dominance and resistance, and transnational mechanisms (e.g., imported stratification and the lateral mobility hypothesis) that link origin- and destination-country hierarchies. Drawing on evidence from Latin America and the Caribbean, Africa, South and Southeast Asia, and the global macroeconomy, we synthesize research on intergenerational mobility, wealth and asset inequality, labor-market segmentation, colorism, caste and ethnicity, gendered and intersectional constraints, spatial inequality and property regimes, and global value chains. We conclude by outlining how GSE reshapes measurement and international policy evaluation by centering group-differentiated outcomes, institutional transformation, and pillars of recognition, redistribution, and repair and by offering a checklist for researchers to apply GSE.
34664.zh_abstract: 我们创造了“全球分层经济学”（GSE）这一术语，将分层经济学（SE）扩展到国际背景中，在这些背景下出现的机制可以被识别为（1）普遍存在但与国家发展路径的定位相匹配，或（2）具有情境特异性且历史依赖，其方式与美国及其他国际环境不同。基于SE的核心见解——群体争夺稀缺资源，且主导群体制定规则以维持优势——我们将GSE定义为一种方法，它强调历史起源（例如，定居者殖民主义、奴隶制、种姓制度、掠夺性治理、军事干预）、构建支配与抵抗的地方制度，以及连接原籍国和目的地国等级制度的跨国机制（例如，输入性分层和横向流动性假说）。借鉴来自拉丁美洲和加勒比地区、非洲、南亚和东南亚以及全球宏观经济的证据，我们综合了关于代际流动性、财富和资产不平等、劳动力市场分割、肤色歧视、种姓和民族、性别和交叉性约束、空间不平等与产权制度以及全球价值链的研究。最后，我们概述了GSE如何通过聚焦群体差异化结果、制度转型以及承认、再分配和修复的支柱，并提供一个供研究人员应用GSE的检查清单，来重塑衡量标准和国际政策评估。

34663.title: The Impacts of Parole Supervision
34663.authors: Luke D. Brinkman, Andrew Jordan, Derek Neal
34663.abstract: We study the impacts of a reform to parole supervision in Illinois. The reform reduced the term of supervision for some parolees from 12 months to 6 months. Using a standard difference-in-differences estimator, we find clear evidence that the reform reduced prison re-entry rates. Sharp drops in technical revocation rates drove these reductions. Rates of prison re-admissions linked to new crimes did not change. Cook County Court records also show no evidence that the reform increased crime rates among parolees. The reform reduced both the cost of incarceration and the cost of parolee supervision without creating harms to public safety.
34663.zh_abstract: 我们研究了伊利诺伊州一项假释监督改革的影响。该改革将部分假释人员的监督期限从12个月缩短至6个月。使用标准的双重差分估计量，我们发现有明确证据表明该改革降低了重返监狱率。技术性撤销率的急剧下降推动了这些降低。与新犯罪相关的重新入狱率没有变化。库克县法院的记录也显示，没有证据表明该改革提高了假释人员的犯罪率。该改革既降低了监禁成本，也降低了假释监督成本，且未对公共安全造成损害。

34662.title: Nuclear Operations with a High Penetration of Renewables: The Case of France
34662.zh_title: 可再生能源高渗透率下的核电运营：以法国为例
34662.abstract: Nuclear and intermittent renewables (wind and solar) are generally regarded as the only scalable technologies producing low-carbon electricity. However, the extent to which these technologies can co-exist in a reliable power system depends on whether nuclear units can adjust their operations to renewable output fluctuations. Using hourly data from the French power system, we find that nuclear units are operated quite flexibly, and that the foregone energy production due to “load following” actions (relative to the counterfactual of operating at full capacity during load following events) is currently limited. However, we find that an additional load following event is associated with a slightly higher likelihood of a unit failure. We also find that unit-level minimum output constraints are binding more frequently as system-wide renewable generation increases, especially so for units most exposed to solar generation. In 2024, hours during which available nuclear flexibility was exhausted are associated with non-positive hourly day-ahead prices.
34662.zh_abstract: 核电和间歇性可再生能源（风能和太阳能）通常被认为是仅有的两种可规模化生产低碳电力的技术。然而，这些技术能否在可靠的电力系统中共存，取决于核电机组能否根据可再生能源出力波动调整其运营。利用法国电力系统的每小时数据，我们发现核电机组的运营相当灵活，并且由于“负荷跟踪”行动（相对于在负荷跟踪事件期间满负荷运行的反事实情况）而损失的发电量目前有限。然而，我们发现，额外的负荷跟踪事件与机组故障概率的轻微增加相关。我们还发现，随着整个系统可再生能源发电量的增加，机组层面的最低出力约束更频繁地具有约束力，尤其是对于最受太阳能发电影响的机组。2024年，当可用核电灵活性耗尽时，对应的小时日前电价为非正值。

34661.title: Macroeconomic Impacts of Microeconomic Damages in General Equilibrium: Productivity and Capital Losses
34661.zh_title: 一般均衡中微观损害对宏观经济的影响：生产率和资本损失
34661.authors: Marc A. C. Hafstead, Roberton C. Williams III
34661.abstract: The full economic costs and macroeconomic effects of microeconomic damages associated with pollution damages, climate impacts, and similar negative shocks are not well understood. Beyond the direct damages, market distortions, supply chains, changes in capital and labor costs, etc. can potentially magnify (or diminish) the costs of these shocks. In this paper, we use analytical and numerical general equilibrium models to investigate the channels through which microeconomic shocks affect the macroeconomy. We model different types of shocks, evaluate how anticipation affects the macroeconomic implications of shocks, and measure the overall welfare costs relative to the value of direct damages. We find that preexisting taxes magnify the overall welfare costs relative to direct damages, that savings and investment decisions driven by anticipations of certain types of shocks can interact with tax distortions to lower welfare costs, and that the ratio of welfare cost to direct damages varies substantially across sectors of the economy.
34661.zh_abstract: 与污染损害、气候影响及类似负面冲击相关的微观损害的全部经济成本和宏观经济效应尚不明确。除了直接损害之外，市场扭曲、供应链、资本和劳动力成本变化等因素可能会放大（或缩小）这些冲击的成本。在本文中，我们使用解析和数值一般均衡模型来研究微观经济冲击影响宏观经济的渠道。我们对不同类型的冲击进行建模，评估预期如何影响冲击的宏观经济含义，并衡量相对于直接损害价值的总体福利成本。我们发现，相对于直接损害，预先存在的税收放大了总体福利成本；由对某些类型冲击的预期驱动的储蓄和投资决策可以与税收扭曲相互作用以降低福利成本；并且福利成本与直接损害的比率在经济各部门之间存在显著差异。

34660.title: Does LLM Assistance Improve Healthcare Delivery? An Evaluation Using On-site Physicians and Laboratory Tests
34660.zh_title: 大语言模型辅助能否改善医疗服务？基于现场医生和实验室检测的评估
34660.authors: Jason Abaluck, Robert Pless, Nirmal Ravi, Anja Sautmann, Aaron Schwartz
34660.abstract: We deployed large language model (LLM) decision support for health workers at two outpatient clinics in Nigeria. For each patient, health workers drafted care plans that were optionally revised after LLM feedback. We compared unassisted and assisted plans using blinded randomized assessments by on-site physicians who evaluated and treated the same patients, as well as results from laboratory tests for common conditions. Academic physicians performed blinded retrospective reviews of a subset of notes. In response to LLM feedback, health workers changed their prescribing for more than half of the patients and reported high satisfaction with the recommendations, and retrospective academic reviewers rated LLM-assisted plans more favorably. However, on-site physicians observed little to no improvement in diagnostic alignment or treatment decisions. Laboratory testing showed mixed effects of LLM-assistance, which removed negative tests for malaria but added them for urinary tract infection and anemia, with no significant increase in the detection rates for the tested conditions.
34660.zh_abstract: 我们在尼日利亚的两家门诊诊所部署了大语言模型（LLM）决策支持系统，供卫生工作者使用。对于每位患者，卫生工作者起草护理计划，并可在收到LLM反馈后选择性地进行修改。我们使用现场医生的盲法随机评估来比较未辅助和辅助的计划，这些医生对同一批患者进行评估和治疗，同时我们还使用了针对常见疾病的实验室检测结果。学术医生对部分病历记录进行了盲法回顾性审查。作为对LLM反馈的回应，卫生工作者改变了超过一半患者的处方，并对建议表示高度满意，回顾性审查的学术评审员对LLM辅助计划的评价也更有利。然而，现场医生观察到诊断一致性或治疗决策几乎没有改善。实验室检测显示LLM辅助的效果不一，它减少了疟疾的阴性检测结果，但增加了尿路感染和贫血的阴性检测结果，且对所检测疾病的检出率没有显著提高。

34659.title: Dementia and Long-run Trajectories in Household Finances
34659.zh_title: 痴呆症与家庭财务的长期轨迹
34659.authors: Jing Li, Kathleen M. McGarry, Lauren Hersch Nicholas, Jonathan S. Skinner
34659.abstract: Existing evidence suggests that wealth may decline before dementia onset, but the mechanisms underlying these reductions are poorly understood. Using longitudinal data from the Health and Retirement Study, we compare household finance trajectories for individuals who later develop dementia and those who do not. We find that wealth divergence between the two groups is not explained by reduced earnings, higher healthcare spending, intentional “spend-down” to qualify for Medicaid coverage, state-dependent utility, or reverse causation by which wealth declines cause dementia. Instead, our results point to impaired financial decision-making beginning about six years prior to clinically recognizable dementia.
34659.zh_abstract: 现有证据表明，财富可能在痴呆症发病前下降，但导致这些减少的机制尚不明确。利用健康与退休研究的纵向数据，我们比较了后来发展为痴呆症和未发展为痴呆症的个体的家庭财务轨迹。我们发现，两组之间的财富差异不能用收入减少、医疗支出增加、为获得医疗补助资格而故意“花光资产”、状态依赖效用或财富下降导致痴呆症的反向因果关系来解释。相反，我们的结果指向在临床可识别的痴呆症发病前约六年开始出现的财务决策能力受损。

34658.title: World Trading System For Whom? Evidence from Global Tariffs
34658.zh_title: 世界贸易体系为谁而设？来自全球关税的证据
34658.authors: Rodrigo Adão, John Sturm Becko, Arnaud Costinot, Dave Donaldson
34658.abstract: We use global tariffs to reveal the weights that nations implicitly place on the welfare of their trading partners relative to their own. Our estimated welfare weights suggest that formal and informal rules of the world trading system make countries internalize the impact of their policies onto others to a substantial extent, though not fully. On average, countries place 25% less value on transfers to foreigners than transfers to their own residents. Across nations, we find that countries that put higher welfare weights on the welfare of foreigners also tend to receive higher weights from them, consistent with a general form of reciprocity among nations. Using our estimated welfare weights, we provide a first look at what countries stand to lose, or gain, from the dissolution of the world trading system as we know it.
34658.zh_abstract: 我们利用全球关税来揭示各国在自身福利与其贸易伙伴福利之间隐含赋予的权重。我们估算的福利权重表明，世界贸易体系的正式和非正式规则使各国在很大程度上（尽管并非完全）将其政策对他国的影响内部化。平均而言，各国对外国人的转移支付估值比对其本国居民的转移支付低25%。跨国来看，我们发现，那些对他国福利赋予更高福利权重的国家，往往也从对方国家获得更高的权重，这与国家间一种普遍的互惠形式相一致。利用我们估算的福利权重，我们首次揭示了各国在我们所熟知的世界贸易体系解体时可能遭受的损失或获得的收益。

34657.title: Does Advertising Expand the Market for Hospital Services? Evidence from Medicare
34657.zh_title: 广告是否扩大了医院服务的市场？来自医疗保险的证据
34657.authors: Abby E. Alpert, Atul Gupta, Michael R. Richards, Sarah D. Schutz, Christopher M. Whaley
34657.abstract: Direct-to-consumer advertising is pervasive in US healthcare markets, but little evidence exists on the effects of advertising by hospitals, second only to drug manufacturers in medical marketing. Advertising may help facilities increase market share by stealing existing patients, expand the market for hospital care, or do both. Regardless, it has important public finance implications due to the large sums of taxpayer funds spent by federal and state governments to subsidize hospital operations and finance care through public insurance programs. This paper provides the first causal evidence, to our knowledge, on the market expansion effects of hospital advertising. To obtain causal estimates, we leverage the fact that spikes in political advertising significantly crowd out hospital advertising in the same market, motivating an instrumental variables design. Using claims data on the universe of Traditional Medicare beneficiaries, we find that advertising expands aggregate patient volume and spending on inpatient care – though to a modest degree (implied elasticities of 0.06 and 0.05, respectively). Although the overall effect of advertising on hospital outpatient care is muted, for-profit hospitals obtain higher outpatient Medicare volume and revenue with greater advertising. Across both care settings, therefore, Medicare spending increases with hospital advertising.
34657.zh_abstract: 直接面向消费者的广告在美国医疗保健市场中普遍存在，但关于医院广告（其支出在医疗营销中仅次于药品制造商）影响的证据却很少。广告可能通过抢夺现有患者来帮助医疗机构增加市场份额，扩大医院护理市场，或两者兼而有之。无论如何，由于联邦和州政府投入大量纳税人资金补贴医院运营并通过公共保险计划资助医疗服务，广告具有重要的公共财政影响。据我们所知，本文首次提供了关于医院广告市场扩张效应的因果证据。为了获得因果估计，我们利用了政治广告激增会显著挤出同一市场中的医院广告这一事实，从而设计了一个工具变量方法。利用覆盖所有传统医疗保险受益人的索赔数据，我们发现广告扩大了住院患者的总体就诊量和支出——尽管程度不大（隐含弹性分别为0.06和0.05）。尽管广告对医院门诊护理的总体影响较弱，但营利性医院通过增加广告获得了更高的门诊医疗保险就诊量和收入。因此，在两种护理环境中，医疗保险支出都随着医院广告的增加而增加。

34656.title: Aging and Housing Returns
34656.authors: Natee Amornsiripanitch, Philip E. Strahan, Song Zhang
34656.abstract: Older home sellers receive lower returns than younger home sellers. Homes sold by older people have fewer major renovations but higher rates of poor upkeep. Older sellers are also more likely to sell off-MLS (“pocket listings”) and to sell to investors, leading to lower prices. These patterns suggest that older sellers may be disproportionately disadvantaged by agents’ incentive to maximize fees through generating high sales volume instead of maximizing sale prices. Age-related cognitive decline makes the elderly more vulnerable. For causal evidence, we show that reforms making pocket listings more transparent reduced both the prevalence of pocket listings and the magnitude of the age gap in returns.
34656.zh_abstract: 年长房屋卖家获得的回报低于年轻房屋卖家。老年人出售的房屋进行重大翻新的次数较少，但维护不善的比例更高。年长卖家也更有可能通过非MLS渠道（“口袋挂牌”）出售房屋，并出售给投资者，从而导致价格较低。这些模式表明，年长卖家可能因代理人倾向于通过产生高销售量而非最大化销售价格来最大化费用而处于特别不利的地位。与年龄相关的认知衰退使老年人更加脆弱。作为因果证据，我们表明，使口袋挂牌更加透明的改革既降低了口袋挂牌的普遍性，也缩小了回报中的年龄差距。

34655.title: The Effects of Pension Reforms on Health Inequality in Italy
34655.zh_title: 养老金改革对意大利健康不平等的影响
34655.authors: Agar Brugiavini, Raluca Elena Buia, Giacomo Pasini, Guglielmo Weber
34655.abstract: Using data from the Survey on Health, Ageing and Retirement in Europe (SHARE), we explore whether the recent pension reforms enacted in Italy had an impact on the inequality in health among individuals. We construct a set of indexes measuring several health outcomes (both physical and mental) and analyze their evolution along time (across SHARE waves) from 2004 to 2022, by relating them to the households’ income. While we can observe some differences in the health-income gradient between genders, we do not find evidence of a positive relationship between the introduction of the pension reforms and an increase in inequality.
34655.zh_abstract: 利用欧洲健康、老龄化和退休调查（SHARE）的数据，我们探讨了意大利近期实施的养老金改革是否对个体间的健康不平等产生了影响。我们构建了一组衡量多种健康结果（包括身体和心理健康）的指标，并通过将其与家庭收入相关联，分析了这些指标从2004年到2022年随时间（跨SHARE调查波次）的演变。虽然我们观察到性别之间在健康-收入梯度上存在一些差异，但我们没有发现证据表明养老金改革的引入与不平等加剧之间存在正相关关系。

34699.title: Monopsony, Markdowns, and Minimum Wages
34699.zh_title: 买方垄断、加价折让与最低工资
34699.authors: Ester Faia, Benjamin Lochner, Benjamin Schoefer
34699.abstract: This paper presents the first direct test of two interlinked predictions at the core of the monopsony theory of the labor market: (i) that firms exploit wage-setting power by marking down wages below the marginal revenue product of labor, and (ii) that exogenous wage constraints, if binding, eliminate markdowns. Our research design revisits the 2015 introduction of a high minimum wage in Germany. Drawing on a monopsony model, we derive an empirically tractable difference-in-differences specification that provides a quantitative benchmark for the firm-level markdown response. Our main result is that empirical markdowns respond only 0–25% as much as the monopsony model would have predicted. Hence, at least for the labor market segment we study, (i) markdowns largely reflect other distortions than monopsony, (ii) markdowns are mismeasured, (iii) minimum wages induce widespread labor shortages, or (iv) the standard monopsony model does not provide a full, realistic account of the labor market.
34699.zh_abstract: 本文首次对劳动力市场买方垄断理论核心的两个相互关联的预测进行了直接检验：（i）企业通过将工资压低至劳动力边际收益产品以下来利用工资设定权力，以及（ii）外生的工资约束如果具有约束力，则会消除加价折让。我们的研究设计重新审视了2015年德国引入高最低工资的情况。基于一个买方垄断模型，我们推导出一个经验上可处理的倍差法设定，该设定为企业层面的加价折让反应提供了一个定量基准。我们的主要结果是，经验加价折让的反应程度仅为买方垄断模型预测值的0-25%。因此，至少对于我们研究的劳动力市场细分部分而言，（i）加价折让在很大程度上反映了买方垄断以外的其他扭曲，（ii）加价折让被错误衡量，（iii）最低工资导致了普遍的劳动力短缺，或者（iv）标准的买方垄断模型并未对劳动力市场提供一个完整、现实的解释。
34699.meta: Programs：EFG, IO, LS, PR；JEL：E0, J0, L0

34698.title: SNAP Work Requirements, Administrative Burden and Procedural Denials
34698.zh_title: SNAP 工作要求、行政负担与程序性拒绝
34698.authors: Jason B. Cook, Elizabeth Cox, Chloe N. East
34698.abstract: Work requirements are often criticized for imposing administrative burdens that reduce access to benefits, yet prior research has struggled to isolate this mechanism from other sources of disenrollment. This paper provides direct evidence by examining procedural denials in the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP). We study work requirements for Able-Bodied Adults Without Dependents (ABAWDs) and exploit age-based exemptions that apply to individuals aged 50 and older. Using administrative data and difference-in-differences models leveraging waiver periods, we find that work requirements significantly increase procedural and overall denials. Our results indicate that these policies deter participation through imposed administrative burdens.
34698.zh_abstract: 工作要求常被批评为施加了行政负担，从而减少了福利的获取，然而先前的研究难以将这一机制与其他导致退出注册的因素区分开来。本文通过考察补充营养援助计划（SNAP）中的程序性拒绝提供了直接证据。我们研究了针对无受抚养人的健全成年人（ABAWDs）的工作要求，并利用了适用于50岁及以上个体的基于年龄的豁免。利用行政数据和利用豁免期的双重差分模型，我们发现工作要求显著增加了程序性拒绝和总体拒绝。我们的结果表明，这些政策通过施加的行政负担阻碍了参与。

34697.title: Party Pressure and Representation
34697.abstract: I study how political parties affect representation in the U.S. House. To do so, I account for party pressure on the votes of members in an otherwise standard spatial model that uses roll call voting patterns to identify member ideologies. I simultaneously estimate voter ideologies from survey responses, leveraging their responses on issues before Congress to bridge voters and members into the same ideological space. I find that, relative to a model without party pressure, member ideologies and those of their constituents are much more closely aligned. The results imply that, in terms of actual votes, parties drive a wedge between members and those they represent. I provide evidence that parties do so strategically, balancing the need for legislative wins and the electoral concerns of their members.
34697.zh_abstract: 我研究政党如何影响美国众议院的代表性。为此，我在一个原本标准的空间模型中考虑了政党对议员投票的压力，该模型利用唱名投票模式来识别议员意识形态。我同时通过调查回应估计选民意识形态，利用他们对国会审议议题的回应，将选民和议员置于同一意识形态空间。我发现，相对于没有政党压力的模型，议员意识形态与其选民的意识形态更加紧密地一致。结果表明，就实际投票而言，政党在议员与其所代表的人之间制造了隔阂。我提供的证据表明，政党是策略性地这样做，平衡了对立法胜利的需求与其成员的选举关切。

34696.title: Why is the Mental Health of the Youngest American Workers in Decline?
34696.zh_title: 为什么最年轻的美国工人心理健康状况在恶化？
34696.abstract: The worsening mental health of young workers in the United States drives the disappearance of the U-shape in wellbeing and the hump-shape in illbeing in the last decade. Illbeing declines in age among workers but is hump-shaped among non-workers across all US states. This has been the case for some time and is apparent in our analyses of two large US datasets with long time runs - the Behavioral Risk Survey System 1993-2025 and the National Health Interview Survey of 1997-2024. Although the mental health of workers and non-workers has been declining it has been deteriorating most quickly among young workers, leading to a steepening in the age gradient of mental illbeing for workers. Improvements in worker wellbeing (and declines in worker illbeing) with age are mirrored in age differences in reported working conditions in the American Job Quality Survey of 2025: six measures of job quality rise with age. Declines in mental health are most pronounced among the youngest workers ages 18-22 who are likely drawn from lower socio-economic classes and report the greatest difficulties making ends meet.
34696.zh_abstract: 美国年轻工人心理健康的恶化，是过去十年中幸福感U型曲线和不良健康感倒U型曲线消失的原因。在所有美国州，工人中的不良健康感随年龄增长而下降，但在非工人中呈倒U型。这种情况已持续一段时间，并且在我们对两个具有长时间跨度的美国大型数据集——1993-2025年的行为风险监测系统和1997-2024年的全国健康访谈调查——的分析中显而易见。尽管工人和非工人的心理健康状况都在下降，但年轻工人的恶化速度最快，导致工人心理不良健康感的年龄梯度变得更加陡峭。工人幸福感随年龄增长而改善（以及工人不良健康感下降）与2025年美国工作质量调查中报告的工作条件年龄差异相呼应：六项工作质量指标随年龄增长而上升。心理健康状况下降在18-22岁的最年轻工人中最为显著，他们可能来自较低的社会经济阶层，并且报告在维持生计方面面临最大困难。

34695.title: Hitting Rock Bottom: Economic Hardship and Cheating
34695.zh_title: 跌入谷底：经济困难与欺骗行为
34695.authors: Livia Alfonsi, Michal Bauer, Julie Chytilová, Edward Miguel
34695.abstract: This paper investigates whether economic hardship undermines preferences for honesty. We use controlled, high-stake measures of cheating for private benefit in a large sample of 5,664 Kenyans, exploiting three complementary sources of variation: experimentally manipulated monetary incentives to cheat, a randomized increase in the salience of one’s own financial situation, and the Covid‐19 income shock (exploiting randomized survey timing, with respondents interviewed before vs. during the crisis). We find that cheating behavior is highly responsive to financial incentives in the experiment. Covid-19 economic hardship—marked by a 51% drop in monthly earnings—leads to a sharp increase in the prevalence of cheating, and the effect increases gradually with prolonged hardship. The effects are largest among the most economically impacted and are amplified when the salience of one’s own financial situation is experimentally increased. The results demonstrate that while most individuals exhibit a strong preference against cheating under normal conditions (in line with the existing body of work), economic forces can account for a substantial share of variation in dishonesty: the estimated cheating rate rises from 29% under low stakes in normal times to 86% under high stakes during the crisis.
34695.zh_abstract: 本文研究经济困难是否会削弱对诚实的偏好。我们在一个包含5,664名肯尼亚人的大样本中，使用了受控的、高风险的为私利而欺骗的衡量指标，利用了三种互补的变异来源：实验操纵的欺骗金钱激励、随机增加个人财务状况的显著性，以及新冠疫情收入冲击（利用随机化的调查时间，受访者在危机前与危机期间接受采访）。我们发现，在实验中，欺骗行为对金钱激励高度敏感。新冠疫情经济困难——以月收入下降51%为标志——导致欺骗发生率急剧上升，并且这种效应随着困难的持续而逐渐增强。影响在经济上受影响最严重的群体中最大，并且当个人财务状况的显著性被实验性提高时，这种影响会被放大。结果表明，尽管大多数个体在正常情况下表现出强烈的反欺骗偏好（与现有研究一致），但经济因素可以解释不诚实行为中的很大一部分变异：估计的欺骗率从正常时期低风险下的29%上升到危机期间高风险下的86%。

34694.title: The Geography of Science
34694.abstract: Science has long been concentrated in the Western world, but the global research landscape is undergoing a profound reorganization. Using data on 44 million publications from 1980 to 2022, we document the geography of science in terms of who produces it, what it studies, and where it diffuses. The share of publications produced in the United States has fallen from 40% in 1980 to 15% in 2022, while China’s share has risen from near-zero to 32%. This pattern extends even to elite outlets, with China now producing over 35% of top-journal publications. Notably, this is driven not only by an expanding researcher base but also—to a large extent—by increases in individual productivity. This growth varies by fields: China leads in the Engineering and Physical Sciences (such as Chemistry), while the US retains its lead in Biomedical and Health Sciences. Moreover, China’s expanding leadership in scientific production has not translated into a commensurate shift in global diffusion and integration. Elite research remains disproportionately focused on US topics (40% of breakthrough publications), and citations to Chinese research disproportionately come from within China rather than from other regions, even for top-tier science. Similar to China, other middle- and low-income countries (including India, Russia, and Brazil) have also expanded output producing as much research as high-income European Union countries combined (about 21% overall) but they remain underrepresented in top-tier journals. Overall, our findings highlight both the democratization and fragmentation of global science, raising important questions about the future of the global scientific enterprise.
34694.zh_abstract: 科学长期以来集中在西方世界，但全球研究格局正在经历深刻的重新组织。利用1980年至2022年间4400万篇出版物的数据，我们从谁生产科学、研究什么以及在哪里传播三个方面记录了科学的地理分布。美国生产的出版物份额从1980年的40%下降到2022年的15%，而中国的份额从接近零上升到32%。这种模式甚至延伸到精英期刊，中国现在生产超过35%的顶级期刊出版物。值得注意的是，这不仅是由于研究人员基础的扩大，而且在很大程度上是由于个人生产力的提高。这种增长因领域而异：中国在工程和物理科学（如化学）领域领先，而美国在生物医学和健康科学领域保持领先。此外，中国在科学生产方面不断扩大的领导地位并未转化为全球传播和整合方面的相应转变。精英研究仍然不成比例地关注美国主题（占突破性出版物的40%），并且对中国研究的引用不成比例地来自中国内部而非其他地区，即使对于顶级科学也是如此。与中国类似，其他中低收入国家（包括印度、俄罗斯和巴西）也扩大了产出，其研究总量与高收入欧盟国家总和相当（约占整体的21%），但它们在顶级期刊中的代表性仍然不足。总体而言，我们的发现突显了全球科学的民主化和碎片化，引发了对全球科学事业未来的重要问题。

34693.title: Customer Overlap and Diversion Ratios
34693.authors: Liran Einav, Mariana D. Guido, Peter J. Klenow
34693.abstract: We define the concept of customer overlap of product j with product k as the share of j's customers who buy k. We then argue that, in appropriate contexts, customer overlaps are an excellent proxy for diversion ratios, a useful and popular way to summarize competition between sellers of substitute products. Unlike diversion ratios, which are often challenging to estimate, customer overlaps are straightforwardly observed in many data sets. We show theoretically, and then validate empirically, the close connection between customer overlaps and diversion ratios. We then illustrate the potential use of customer overlap in contexts where estimation of diversion ratios could be prohibitive.
34693.zh_abstract: 我们将产品j与产品k的客户重叠定义为购买产品k的j客户所占的份额。然后我们论证，在适当的背景下，客户重叠是转移率的一个极好的代理变量，转移率是总结替代品卖家之间竞争的一种有用且流行的方法。与通常难以估计的转移率不同，客户重叠在许多数据集中可以直接观察到。我们从理论上证明，然后通过实证验证，客户重叠与转移率之间的紧密联系。然后，我们说明了在估计转移率可能成本高昂的背景下，客户重叠的潜在用途。

34692.title: Skipping the Factory: Service-Led Growth and Structural Transformation in the Developing World
34692.zh_title: 跳过工厂：发展中国家的服务业主导增长与结构转型
34692.authors: Michael Peters, Youdan Zhang, Fabrizio Zilibotti
34692.abstract: In today’s developing world, many economies appear to bypass industrialization and transition directly from agriculture to services. The largest rise in service employment has occurred in non-tradable consumer services, such as retail and hospitality, especially in urban areas, where many cities resemble consumer hubs built around local demand. These patterns of growth raise fundamental questions: Can service-led growth sustain a growth of living standards over time? Is service-led growth inherently biased toward affluent urban consumers? What role should policy play? We propose a parsimonious general equilibrium framework that incorporates non-homothetic preferences and locally non-tradable consumer services. Our framework bridges macro and micro perspectives, and enables counterfactual and welfare analysis that accounts for both individual and spatial heterogeneity. We relate our framework to the recent literature and suggest several extensions and directions of future research.
34692.zh_abstract: 在当今的发展中世界，许多经济体似乎绕过了工业化，直接从农业过渡到服务业。服务业就业的最大增长发生在非贸易性消费服务业，如零售和酒店业，尤其是在城市地区，许多城市看起来像是围绕本地需求建立的消费中心。这些增长模式引发了根本性问题：服务业主导的增长能否长期维持生活水平的提升？服务业主导的增长是否天生偏向富裕的城市消费者？政策应发挥什么作用？我们提出了一个简约的一般均衡框架，该框架包含了非位似偏好和本地非贸易性消费服务。我们的框架连接了宏观和微观视角，并能够进行反事实和福利分析，同时考虑个体和空间异质性。我们将我们的框架与近期文献联系起来，并提出了未来研究的若干扩展和方向。

34691.title: Ricardian Non-Equivalence
34691.authors: Martin S. Eichenbaum, Joao Guerreiro, Jana Obradovic
34691.abstract: This paper presents new survey evidence on how household spending changes in response to fiscal transfers. Our key finding is that the planned propensity to spend out of transfers equals the marginal propensity to consume (MPC). This result implies that households do not incorporate future tax liabilities into their spending plans. The canonical HANK model cannot account for our survey results because people in that model are overly sensitive to future tax liabilities. We develop an extended HANK model in which households are partially inattentive to future tax liabilities and to the general-equilibrium consequences of fiscal policy. This inattention dampens forward-looking intertemporal MPCs, bringing the model into line with our survey evidence. We use the model to analyze the aggregate effects of fiscal policy changes and find that both transfer and government spending multipliers are larger in the inattentive HANK model than in the canonical HANK framework.
34691.zh_abstract: 本文提供了关于家庭支出如何响应财政转移支付变化的新调查证据。我们的关键发现是，计划从转移支付中支出的倾向等于边际消费倾向（MPC）。这一结果意味着家庭没有将未来的税收负担纳入其支出计划。标准的HANK模型无法解释我们的调查结果，因为该模型中的人对未来税收负担过于敏感。我们开发了一个扩展的HANK模型，其中家庭对未来税收负担以及财政政策的一般均衡后果部分地不关注。这种不关注抑制了前瞻性的跨期MPC，使模型与我们的调查证据一致。我们使用该模型分析财政政策变化的总体效应，发现与标准的HANK框架相比，在不关注的HANK模型中，转移支付和政府支出乘数都更大。

34690.title: AI-Enhanced Handheld ECGs to Screen for Prior Myocardial Infarction in Rural India
34690.zh_title: AI增强手持心电图在印度农村筛查既往心肌梗死中的应用
34690.authors: Jenny Wang, Alexander Schubert, Nikhil Kanakamedala, Madeline McKelway, Luke Messac, Cyrus Reginald, Frank Schilbach, T.S. Selvavinayagam, Girija Vaidyanathan, Esther Duflo, Ziad Obermeyer
34690.abstract: Efforts to move care out of hospitals and into the community face a hard constraint: while most medications can be delivered anywhere, diagnosis is still mostly trapped inside the formal health system—clinics, hospitals, and the people and machines inside them. This is especially binding in low- and middle-income countries due to distance, cost, and limited health system capacity. Low-cost data collection devices (e.g., handheld electrocardiograms (ECGs), retinal cameras) are promising, but do not solve the bottleneck: their outputs still require expert interpretation. Artificial intelligence (AI) could turn these raw signals into actionable outputs at scale, but most medical AI is trained in high-income settings and deteriorates in different populations and settings. We assemble a new dataset in rural Tamil Nadu, India that links low-cost device signals to hospital-grade reference testing. We use it to build a proof-of-concept screening tool: an algorithm that predicts the result of a hospital-based reference-standard test (regional wall motion abnormality on echocardiography), using only data from a handheld ECG device (cost: $\$60$). This would allow targeting of secondary prevention medications—high-dose statins, antiplatelet agents, and beta blockers—proven to be cost-effective in both high- and low-resource settings. We evaluate predictive performance and cost-effectiveness of such screening, benchmarking against common clinical risk scores (including the American Heart Association 10-year risk score). In a held-out test set, our model identifies subgroups with rates high enough to make screening very cost-effective: the top 2.5% have a 9.3% rate of evidence consistent with prior heart attack—about six times the base rate—delivering benefits at US$\$1,999$ per life-year saved. The model also flags high-yield patients who would be missed by standard clinical scores, underscoring the limits of transporting Western-derived risk tools to low- and middle-income settings. To enable extensions to other conditions in the dataset, we make all data freely available for research.
34690.zh_abstract: 将医疗服务从医院转移到社区的努力面临一个硬性约束：虽然大多数药物可以在任何地方提供，但诊断仍然主要局限于正式卫生系统内部——诊所、医院以及其中的人员和设备。由于距离、成本和有限的卫生系统能力，这一点在中低收入国家尤为突出。低成本数据采集设备（例如手持心电图机、视网膜相机）前景广阔，但并未解决瓶颈问题：它们的输出仍然需要专家解读。人工智能可以将这些原始信号大规模转化为可操作的结果，但大多数医学人工智能是在高收入环境中训练的，在不同人群和环境中性能会下降。我们在印度泰米尔纳德邦农村地区收集了一个新的数据集，将低成本设备信号与医院级参考测试联系起来。我们利用它构建了一个概念验证筛查工具：一种仅使用手持心电图设备（成本：60美元）的数据来预测基于医院的参考标准测试结果（超声心动图显示的局部室壁运动异常）的算法。这将有助于针对性地使用二级预防药物——高剂量他汀类药物、抗血小板药物和β受体阻滞剂——这些药物在高低资源环境中均被证明具有成本效益。我们评估了此类筛查的预测性能和成本效益，并以常见的临床风险评分（包括美国心脏协会10年风险评分）作为基准。在保留的测试集中，我们的模型识别出的亚组其比率高到足以使筛查非常具有成本效益：前2.5%的人群中，有9.3%的人存在与既往心脏病发作一致的证据——约为基础比率的六倍——每挽救一个生命年可带来1,999美元的收益。该模型还标记了标准临床评分会遗漏的高收益患者，这突显了将西方衍生的风险工具移植到中低收入环境中的局限性。为了能够将研究扩展到数据集中的其他疾病，我们免费提供所有数据供研究使用。

34689.title: Financial Globalization: Risk Sharing or Risk Exposure?
34689.zh_title: 金融全球化：风险分担还是风险暴露？
34689.abstract: We study how the increased cross-country ownership of financial assets between advanced and emerging economies impacted their financial and macroeconomic volatility. While cross-country ownership improved risk-sharing and reduced volatility associated with financial crises, it also increased the exposure of countries to foreign crises, leading to higher international co-movement. Through quantitative applications of a two-region model representative of advanced and emerging economies, we find that financial globalization reduced volatility worldwide, but significantly more in emerging economies.
34689.zh_abstract: 我们研究了发达经济体和新兴经济体之间跨境金融资产所有权增加如何影响其金融和宏观经济波动性。虽然跨境所有权改善了风险分担并降低了与金融危机相关的波动性，但它也增加了各国对外国危机的暴露，导致更高的国际联动性。通过应用代表发达经济体和新兴经济体的两区域模型的定量分析，我们发现金融全球化降低了全球范围内的波动性，但在新兴经济体中降低得更为显著。

34688.title: Capital Flows in a World Starved for Liquidity: Analysis and Policy Implications
34688.zh_title: 流动性匮乏世界中的资本流动：分析与政策含义
34688.abstract: We propose a framework for studying financial and macroeconomic dynamics in an environment where liquid assets have a productive use but their supply is limited (i.e., the economy is starved for liquidity). The private demand for financial assets arises from the need to hold them for production. The private supply of financial assets is limited and unstable because of borrowing constraints and default risk. We discuss open-economy applications that analyze the accumulation of foreign reserves by emerging economies, the increase in public debt issued by advanced economies, the rapid growth of emerging economies, structural changes in financial markets, and financial globalization. A key result is that most of these developments led to a decline in interest rates and an increase in global macroeconomic volatility, driven by riskier borrower portfolios.
34688.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一个框架，用于研究在流动性资产具有生产性用途但其供给有限（即经济处于流动性匮乏状态）的环境中的金融和宏观经济动态。对金融资产的私人需求源于持有它们用于生产的需要。由于借贷约束和违约风险，金融资产的私人供给是有限且不稳定的。我们讨论了开放经济应用，分析了新兴经济体的外汇储备积累、发达经济体公共债务的增加、新兴经济体的快速增长、金融市场的结构性变化以及金融全球化。一个关键结果是，这些发展中的大多数导致了利率下降和全球宏观经济波动性增加，其驱动因素是借款人投资组合风险的增加。

34687.title: How Restrictive is U.S. Trade Policy?
34687.zh_title: 美国贸易政策的限制性有多强？
34687.abstract: This short note computes Trade Restrictiveness Index measures for current U.S. trade policy. Building on the ideas of Anderson and Neary (1996, 2005), the Trade Restrictiveness Index is the uniform tariff that leaves the U.S. consumer as well off as under actual policy. As of October 2025, U.S. trade policy is twice as restrictive as headline tariff numbers suggest. The Trade Restrictiveness Index is 23 percent, which stands in contrast to the 11 percent average tariff rate. Trade policy towards Canada and Mexico is two to three times more restrictive than average tariff rates suggest. Sectoral analysis shows that the restrictiveness is concentrated in vehicles, machinery, and electrical equipment.
34687.zh_abstract: 这篇短文计算了当前美国贸易政策的贸易限制指数。基于Anderson和Neary（1996, 2005）的思想，贸易限制指数是指使美国消费者福利水平与实际政策下相同的统一关税。截至2025年10月，美国贸易政策的限制性是其总体关税数字所显示的两倍。贸易限制指数为23%，这与11%的平均关税税率形成鲜明对比。对加拿大和墨西哥的贸易政策的限制性是平均关税税率所显示的两到三倍。行业分析表明，限制性主要集中在车辆、机械和电气设备领域。

34686.title: Subcontracting in Federal Spending: Micro and Macro Implications
34686.zh_title: 联邦支出中的分包：微观与宏观含义
34686.authors: Geumbi Park, Xiaoqing Zhou, Sarah Zubairy
34686.abstract: This paper studies the critical but underexplored role of subcontracting in shaping the spatial and firm-level effects of federal government spending. Using newly available data on defense subcontract awards linked to establishment-level data from NETS, we examine prime–subcontractor relationships across regions, industries, and over time. We document three key facts. First, subcontracting reallocates a substantial share of federal dollars across geographic areas, weakening the link between the location of prime contracts and where spending ultimately occurs. Second, subcontracting shifts spending across industries, notably from service-sector primes to manufacturing subcontractors. Third, large firms dominate subcontracting networks, including by receiving subcontracts from smaller primes. Accounting for geographic reallocation implies that conventional estimates understate local fiscal multipliers by about 20%. Furthermore, local multipliers are smaller for subcontracting than for prime contracting, partly because subcontracted spending is concentrated among large manufacturing firms that exhibit more muted employment responses. Establishment-level evidence further shows that subcontracting generates weaker employment effects, even conditional on firm size and industry, reflecting the less stable nature of subcontracting relationships. Overall, our findings show that subcontracting fundamentally reshapes the transmission of procurement spending through the private sector, with important implications for the local and aggregate effects of federal spending.
34686.zh_abstract: 本文研究了分包在塑造联邦政府支出的空间和企业层面影响中至关重要但未被充分探索的作用。利用新获得的与NETS企业层面数据相关联的国防分包合同数据，我们考察了跨区域、跨行业和跨时间的总承包商-分包商关系。我们记录了三个关键事实。首先，分包将相当大份额的联邦资金重新分配到不同地理区域，削弱了总合同所在地与最终支出地点之间的联系。其次，分包将支出转移到不同行业，特别是从服务行业的总承包商转移到制造业的分包商。第三，大公司在分包网络中占主导地位，包括从小型总承包商那里获得分包合同。考虑地理重新分配意味着传统估计将地方财政乘数低估了约20%。此外，分包的地方乘数小于总承包，部分原因是分包支出集中在那些就业反应较为平缓的大型制造业企业。企业层面的证据进一步表明，即使在控制企业规模和行业的情况下，分包产生的就业效应也较弱，这反映了分包关系的不稳定性。总体而言，我们的研究结果表明，分包从根本上重塑了采购支出通过私营部门的传导，对联邦支出的地方和总体效应具有重要影响。

34685.title: Unlocking Occupational Opportunity: The Labor Market Effects of DACA
34685.zh_title: 解锁职业机会：DACA的劳动力市场效应
34685.authors: Aimee Chin, Kalena Cortes, Camila Morales
34685.abstract: U.S. laws make it illegal for employers to knowingly hire undocumented migrants. This legal constraint affects which firms will employ unauthorized workers and what jobs undocumented migrants can expect to get. As a result, unauthorized migrants are more likely to end up in jobs that have a lower risk of detection of immigration status and are less desirable. The Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals (DACA) policy, which began in August 2012, gave temporary legal authorization to work in the U.S. to a subset of undocumented migrants – those who arrived in the U.S. as children meeting certain other eligibility criteria. In this paper, we use a difference-in-differences strategy to estimate the effect of DACA on the occupational outcomes of young adults who arrived in the U.S. as children. Applying this strategy to individual-level data from the American Community Survey, we find that DACA eligibility decreases the likelihood that noncitizen childhood immigrants hold traditional immigrant jobs or jobs with a high risk of injury, and increases the likelihood of holding a government job or jobs that require occupational licensing. On the whole, DACA eligibility shifts noncitizen childhood immigrants to occupations that are higher-paying and employ more educated workers. These findings are consistent with legal barriers constraining undocumented childhood migrants from taking the jobs they are interested in and have the skills for. These workers are shunted to jobs they find less desirable and there are societal losses from the misallocation of talent.
34685.zh_abstract: 美国法律规定，雇主故意雇佣无证移民是违法的。这一法律约束影响了哪些公司会雇佣无证工人，以及无证移民可以期望获得什么样的工作。因此，无证移民更有可能最终从事那些移民身份被发现的概率较低且不太理想的工作。始于2012年8月的“童年入境暂缓遣返”政策，给予了一部分无证移民——即那些在儿童时期抵达美国并满足其他特定资格标准的移民——在美国的临时合法工作授权。在本文中，我们使用双重差分策略来估计DACA对儿童时期抵达美国的年轻成年人职业结果的影响。将该策略应用于美国社区调查的个人层面数据，我们发现，DACA资格降低了非公民童年移民从事传统移民工作或高受伤风险工作的可能性，并增加了他们从事政府工作或需要职业许可的工作的可能性。总体而言，DACA资格使非公民童年移民转向收入更高、雇佣更多受过教育工人的职业。这些发现与法律障碍限制了无证童年移民从事他们感兴趣且具备技能的工作这一观点一致。这些工人被分流到他们认为不太理想的工作岗位，并且由于人才错配而产生了社会损失。
34685.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：J08, J18, J24

34684.title: Community College Bachelor’s Degrees: How CCB Graduates’ Earnings Compare to AAs and BAs
34684.zh_title: 社区学院学士学位：CCB毕业生与AA和BA毕业生的收入比较
34684.authors: Riley K. Acton, Camila Morales, Kalena Cortes, Julia A. Turner, Lois Miller
34684.abstract: We provide the first descriptive analysis of the economic value of Community College Baccalaureate (CCB) degrees by examining graduates’ early-career earnings, the costs of completing these programs, and the alignment between field of study and subsequent employment. Using administrative data and controlling for institution and field, we find that CCB graduates earn $\$4,000$ to $\$9,000$ more annually than Associate’s (AA) degree holders one year after graduation but experience average earnings penalties of roughly $\$2,000$ relative to traditional Bachelor’s (BA) recipients. These averages mask substantial heterogeneity: penalties are largest in Computer and Information Technology and Engineering Technology, whereas CCB graduates in Nursing, other Healthcare fields, Business, and Criminal Justice exhibit minimal or no penalties. To contextualize these returns, we analyze tuition and fee structures across CCB-granting institutions and identify two dominant pricing models—constant and escalating. Total CCB program costs fall between those of AA and BA degrees, with escalating structures increasing upper-division prices by about 40 percent. Finally, we examine field-to-industry match patterns and find that CCB graduates in fields with well-defined occupational pathways, such as Health Professions and Education, are highly concentrated in aligned industries, while graduates in more diffuse fields, such as Computer Science, are more broadly dispersed.
34684.zh_abstract: 我们首次对社区学院学士学位的经济价值进行了描述性分析，考察了毕业生早期职业生涯的收入、完成这些项目的成本以及所学专业与后续就业之间的匹配程度。利用行政数据并控制机构和专业，我们发现，CCB毕业生在毕业一年后的年收入比副学士学位持有者高出4,000至9,000美元，但相对于传统的学士学位获得者，平均收入损失约为2,000美元。这些平均值掩盖了巨大的异质性：在计算机与信息技术以及工程技术领域，收入损失最大，而护理、其他医疗保健领域、商业和刑事司法领域的CCB毕业生则表现出极小或没有收入损失。为了将这些回报置于背景中，我们分析了授予CCB的机构的学费和杂费结构，并识别出两种主要的定价模式——恒定模式和递增模式。CCB项目的总成本介于AA和BA学位之间，其中递增模式使高年级课程的价格提高了约40%。最后，我们考察了专业与行业的匹配模式，发现拥有明确职业路径领域（如卫生专业和教育）的CCB毕业生高度集中在相关行业，而更广泛领域（如计算机科学）的毕业生则分布更为分散。
34684.meta: Programs：CH, ED, LS, PE；JEL：I21, I23, I24
